name: saas-dev
description: Full-stack SaaS scaffolding suite. PRD → complete app automation. Django + React + Flutter. Autonomous brainstorm → plan → execute pipeline. Enterprise patterns: multi-tenancy, audit logs, 2FA, feature flags, full-text search, webhooks, field encryption, K8s, GDPR. Premium UI: glassmorphism, aurora, neumorphism, Flutter animations.
